headline: Oilfield Services Market Global Forecast Report 2026-2036: Lucrative Opportunities in New Oilfields, Digital Technology Integration, & Expansion of Deepwater and Unconventional Exploration Activities
summary: The global oilfield services market is projected to grow from USD 174.3 billion in 2026 to approximately USD 250.5 billion by 2036, achieving a CAGR of 4.5% during the forecast period. The report titled "Oilfield Services Market by Type, Location, and Geography - Global Forecast to 2036" delves into market trends, growth drivers, and competitor analysis.
